nasb.text: But while Gallio was proconsul of Achaia, the Jews with one accord rose up against Paul and brought him before the judgment seat,

esv.text: But when Gallio was proconsul of Achaia, the Jews made a united attack on Paul and brought him before the tribunal,

cnv.text: 當迦流作亞該亞省長的時候，猶太人一致起來攻擊保羅，拉他到審判臺前，

ccb.text: 迦流出任亚该亚总督时，犹太人联合起来攻击保罗，把他拉上法庭，

csbs.text: 伽利奥任亚该亚省长的时候，犹太人一致起来攻击保罗，把他带到审判台前，
